title: QA Public Overview тАФ FAIL: spine_entry_points missing control spine
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: spine_entry_points lists only the obstruction spine entry point, omitting the control spine. A report that directs the reviewer to only one of the two public spines is not a faithful overview of [119]. Validator fires PO7: SPINE_ENTRY_POINTS_INCOMPLETE.
executive_summary: QA is a modular arithmetic system with two independently certified public spines тАФ an obstruction spine and a control spine тАФ both rooted in QA_CORE_SPEC.v1. The obstruction spine proves that v_p(r)=1 targets are unreachable and prunable at zero cost. The control spine proves the compiler law is domain-generic.

obstruction_spine.theorem: v_p(r)=1 тЖТ unreachable тЖТ pruned тЖТ pruning_ratio=1.0

control_spine.theorem: orbit singularityтЖТsatelliteтЖТcosmos and k=2 preserved across domains

obstruction_example.description: Target r=6, p=3, k=2: v_3(6)=1, forbidden, pruned before search, pruning_ratio=1.0.
obstruction_example.result: forbidden тАФ pruned before search тАФ pruning_ratio=1.0

control_example.description: Cymatics (flatтЖТhexagons) and seismology (quietтЖТsurface_wave) both traverse orbit singularityтЖТsatelliteтЖТcosmos with k=2.

why_it_matters: Both spines are machine-verified through a shared kernel. The obstruction spine governs impossibility and pruning; the control spine governs cross-domain compilation.

canonical_fail_witness.description: spine_entry_points lists only the obstruction spine, omitting the control spine
